DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mary P. Sullivan, Esq., Bowles & Verna LLP (925) 935-3300, for Defendant and Moving Party Miller, Brown & Dannis and Marks
A. Catherine Lagarde, Esq. (415) 331-3284 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Walker
RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT MILLER, BROWN AND DANNIS AND SALLY MARKS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: 1)The Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to Defendant Sally Marks without leave to amend; 2) Demurrer as to Miller Brown and Dannis is SUSTAINED as to the 3rd Cause of Action for harassment; 3) Demurrer as to Miller Brown and Dannis is OVERRULED as to the 4th Cause of Action for intentional infliction of emotional distress; Defendant shall have 10 days within which to file its answer. Order signed. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
